title: Missing nullability annotation in lichen_meshtastic_adapter_disconnected
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:1919-1923
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/include/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.h:296-297

  bool lichen_meshtastic_adapter_disconnected(
      const struct lichen_meshtastic_adapter *_Nonnull adapter);

The adapter parameter is marked _Nonnull, but the implementation handles NULL:
  return adapter != NULL && adapter->disconnected;

This is inconsistent with the annotation. If adapter is NULL, the function returns false (which could be interpreted as 'not disconnected' when it should be 'invalid').

Either:
1. Remove _Nonnull and document that NULL returns false
2. Keep _Nonnull and add assertion/crash on NULL
